rules.label: 0.1.A - Racially discriminatory language (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using discriminatory or stereotypical language based on race.
rules.notes: Excludes slurs.

rules.label: 0.1.A - Racially discriminatory language (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated discriminatory or stereotypical language based on race.

rules.label: 0.1.B - Racial slur usage (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using racial slurs.
rules.notes: Context is not considered.

rules.label: 0.1.B - Racial slur usage (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated racial slur usage.

rules.label: 0.1.C - Sharing racist media (1st offense)
rules.reason: Sharing racist or discriminatory media.
rules.notes: Context is considered. Apply the exact duration manually.

rules.label: 0.1.C - Sharing racist media (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated sharing of racist or discriminatory media.
rules.notes: Apply the exact duration manually.

rules.label: 0.2.A - Hateful LGBTQ+ language not directed at anyone
rules.reason: Using hateful LGBTQ+ language in a non-directed context.
rules.notes: Use this when the rulebook says to warn first.

rules.label: 0.2.A - Hateful LGBTQ+ language (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using hateful language toward the LGBTQ+ community.

rules.label: 0.2.A - Hateful LGBTQ+ language (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated hateful language toward the LGBTQ+ community.

rules.duration_text: Profile Removal Request / 3 Month Ban if ignored
rules.label: 0.2.B - Homophobic profile content
rules.reason: Using profile elements to represent homophobic concepts.
rules.notes: Request profile removal first. Ban if they refuse.

rules.label: 0.2.C - LGBTQ+ slur usage (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using slurs targeting the LGBTQ+ community.

rules.label: 0.2.C - LGBTQ+ slur usage (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated use of LGBTQ+ slurs.

rules.label: 0.2.D - Anti-LGBTQ+ media (1st offense)
rules.reason: Sharing anti-LGBTQ+ media.

rules.label: 0.2.D - Anti-LGBTQ+ media (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated sharing of anti-LGBTQ+ media.

rules.label: 0.2.D - Anti-LGBTQ+ media (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent sharing of anti-LGBTQ+ media.

rules.label: 0.2.E - Homophobic wording as insult (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using wording that can be interpreted as homophobic.

rules.label: 0.2.E - Homophobic wording as insult (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated use of homophobic wording as an insult.

rules.label: 0.2.E - Homophobic wording as insult (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued use of homophobic wording as an insult.

rules.label: 0.2.E - Homophobic wording as insult (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent use of homophobic wording as an insult.

rules.label: 0.3.A - Minor NSFW solicitation (1st offense)
rules.reason: Posting minor NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.A - Minor NSFW solicitation (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated minor NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.A - Minor NSFW solicitation (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued minor NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.B - Medium NSFW solicitation (1st offense)
rules.reason: Posting medium NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.B - Medium NSFW solicitation (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated medium NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.B - Medium NSFW solicitation (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued medium NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.C - Major NSFW solicitation (1st offense)
rules.reason: Posting explicit NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.label: 0.3.C - Major NSFW solicitation (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated explicit NSFW content or solicitation.

rules.duration_text: Profile Removal Request / 1 Year Ban if ignored
rules.label: 0.3.D - NSFW profile promotion
rules.reason: Promoting NSFW media through profile elements.
rules.notes: Request profile cleanup first.

rules.label: 0.4.A - Cyber bullying / targeted aggression (1st offense)
rules.reason: Cyber bullying or targeted aggression that causes harm.

rules.label: 0.4.A - Cyber bullying / targeted aggression (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated cyber bullying or targeted aggression.

rules.label: 0.4.A - Cyber bullying / targeted aggression (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent cyber bullying or targeted aggression.

rules.label: 0.4.B - Repeated negative opinions toward an individual
rules.reason: Repeatedly voicing negative opinions beyond playful banter.

rules.label: 0.4.B - Repeated dispute escalation
rules.reason: Consistent disputes or repeated targeted negativity.
rules.notes: Rulebook says to follow with more intense mutes or bans based on severity.

rules.label: 0.4.C - Mocking trauma or major tragedies (1st offense)
rules.reason: Mocking traumatic events or significant tragedies.

rules.label: 0.4.C - Mocking trauma or major tragedies (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeatedly mocking trauma or major tragedies.

rules.label: 0.4.D - Sexual harassment (1st offense)
rules.reason: Sexual harassment.

rules.label: 0.4.D - Sexual harassment (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated sexual harassment.

rules.label: 0.4.D - Threat of rape
rules.reason: Threatening rape.
rules.notes: Perm ban no matter the context.

rules.label: 0.4.E - Using rape in gamer vocabulary (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using the word rape casually in gamer vocabulary.

rules.label: 0.4.E - Using rape in gamer vocabulary (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated casual use of rape in gamer vocabulary.

rules.label: 0.4.E - Using rape in gamer vocabulary (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent casual use of rape in gamer vocabulary.

rules.label: 0.4.F - Spam pinging (1st offense)
rules.reason: Spam pinging or pinging without permission.

rules.label: 0.4.F - Spam pinging (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated spam pinging or pinging without permission.

rules.label: 0.4.F - Spam pinging (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued spam pinging or pinging without permission.

rules.label: 0.4.F - Spam pinging (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent spam pinging or pinging without permission.

rules.label: 0.4.G - Encouraging self-harm (1st offense)
rules.reason: Encouraging or suggesting self-harm or suicide.

rules.label: 0.4.G - Encouraging self-harm (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated encouragement of self-harm or suicide.

rules.label: 0.5 - Pedophilia / grooming
rules.reason: Any grooming or inappropriate actions between adult and child.

rules.label: 0.6.A - Religious debate (1st offense)
rules.reason: Engaging in debates surrounding religion or deity ontology.

rules.label: 0.6.A - Religious debate (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated religion debate.

rules.label: 0.6.A - Religious debate (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued religion debate.

rules.label: 0.6.A - Religious debate (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent religion debate despite prior action.

rules.label: 0.6.B - Mocking religion (1st offense)
rules.reason: Mocking religion or treating beliefs as unintelligent.

rules.label: 0.6.B - Mocking religion (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated mocking of religion.

rules.label: 0.6.B - Mocking religion (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued mocking of religion.

rules.label: 0.6.B - Mocking religion (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent mocking of religion.

rules.label: 0.6.C - Anti-Semitic behavior (1st offense)
rules.reason: Discriminating against individuals of Jewish heritage.

rules.label: 0.6.C - Anti-Semitic behavior (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated anti-Semitic behavior.

rules.label: 0.7.A - Promoting sexist ideals (1st offense)
rules.reason: Promoting or upholding sexist ideals.

rules.label: 0.7.A - Promoting sexist ideals (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated promotion of sexist ideals.

rules.label: 0.7.A - Promoting sexist ideals (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent promotion of sexist ideals.

rules.label: 0.7.B - Sexist media/content (1st offense)
rules.reason: Sharing sexist media or content.

rules.label: 0.7.B - Sexist media/content (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated sharing of sexist media or content.

rules.label: 0.7.B - Sexist media/content (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent sharing of sexist media or content.

rules.label: 0.8.A - Support for abhorrent political figures (1st offense)
rules.reason: Expressing support for abhorrent political figures.

rules.label: 0.8.A - Support for abhorrent political figures (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated support for abhorrent political figures.

rules.label: 0.8.B - Political ridicule/disrespect (1st offense)
rules.reason: Ridiculing or disrespecting people over political views.

rules.label: 0.8.B - Political ridicule/disrespect (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated ridicule or disrespect over political views.

rules.label: 0.8.B - Political ridicule/disrespect (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent ridicule or disrespect over political views.

rules.label: 0.9.A - Mocking disabilities (1st offense)
rules.reason: Mocking disabilities.

rules.label: 0.9.A - Mocking disabilities (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated mockery of disabilities.

rules.label: 0.9.A - Mocking disabilities (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent mockery of disabilities.

rules.label: 0.9.B - Indirect ableist slur (1st offense)
rules.reason: Indirectly employing ableist slurs.

rules.label: 0.9.B - Indirect ableist slur (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated indirect ableist slur usage.

rules.label: 0.9.B - Indirect ableist slur (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent indirect ableist slur usage.

rules.label: 0.9.C - Direct ableist slur (1st offense)
rules.reason: Directly employing ableist slurs.

rules.label: 0.9.C - Direct ableist slur (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated direct ableist slur usage.

rules.label: 0.9.C - Direct ableist slur (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent direct ableist slur usage.

rules.label: 0.9.D - Ableist content (1st offense)
rules.reason: Disseminating ableist content.

rules.label: 0.9.D - Ableist content (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated dissemination of ableist content.

rules.label: 0.9.D - Ableist content (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent dissemination of ableist content.

rules.label: 1.0.A - Unauthorized disclosure of personal information
rules.reason: Unauthorized disclosure or illicit acquisition of personal information.

rules.label: 1.0.B - Blackmail using personal information
rules.reason: Using personal information to blackmail someone.

rules.duration_text: Profile Change / 1 Month Ban Until Changed
rules.label: 1.0.C - Profile impersonation
rules.reason: Mimicking someone's profile to impersonate them.
rules.notes: Ask them to change it first.

rules.duration_text: Punish to the extremity of the fake report
rules.label: 1.0.D - Faking evidence
rules.reason: Faking evidence as online defamation.
rules.notes: Mirror the punishment they tried to frame.

rules.label: 1.0.E - Scamming
rules.reason: Scamming if found guilty.

rules.label: 1.1.A - Staff bias report
rules.reason: Report of bias or unfairness by staff.
rules.notes: Supervisors investigate.

rules.label: 1.1.B - Scheduling sabotage (1st offense)
rules.reason: Deliberately disrupting scheduling to weaken competition.

rules.label: 1.1.B - Scheduling sabotage (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated deliberate scheduling sabotage.

rules.label: 1.1.B - Scheduling sabotage (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent deliberate scheduling sabotage.
rules.notes: Captain punishment.

rules.label: 1.1.C - Poaching / bribing players (1st offense)
rules.reason: Poaching or bribing players to weaken teams.

rules.label: 1.1.C - Poaching / bribing players (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated poaching or bribing of players.

rules.label: 1.1.C - Poaching / bribing players (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent poaching or bribing of players.

rules.label: 1.1.D - DDoS attack
rules.reason: Distributed Denial of Service attacking.

rules.label: 1.2.A - Standalone headset connected to PC in official play
rules.reason: Using standalone headsets through PCVR in official matches or ranked.

rules.label: 1.2.B - Reach elongation / worldscale
rules.reason: Using any method to elongate reach.

rules.label: 1.2.C - PSA / crouch jumping / rec room glitch
rules.reason: Playspace abuse or similar banned movement exploits.

rules.label: 1.2.D - Network manipulation / VPN
rules.reason: Using network manipulation such as VPNs.

rules.label: 1.2.E - Allowing cheaters or banned players on team
rules.reason: Knowingly allowing cheaters or banned players on your team.
rules.notes: Captain punishment plus team disqualification.

rules.label: 1.2.F - Game file interference
rules.reason: Interfering with game files.

rules.label: 1.2.G - Performance tampering software/technique
rules.reason: Tampering with game performance using software or techniques.

rules.label: 1.2.H - Out of map exploit
rules.reason: Getting out of the map when such exploits are possible.

rules.label: 1.2.I - Distributing cheating methods
rules.reason: Distributing methods of breaking cheating rules.

rules.label: 1.2.J - Lying about hardware/configuration
rules.reason: Misrepresenting hardware or evading staff questions about setup.

rules.label: 1.2.K - LIV camera use in game
rules.reason: Using LIV camera in a game.

rules.label: 1.2.L - Purposeful DC flicking abuse
rules.reason: Purposeful or abusive DC flicking.
rules.notes: Perm ban at 3 strikes in a season.

rules.label: 1.2.M - Grabbing mechanic usage
rules.reason: Using grabbing mechanic in a game.
rules.notes: Auto FF scrim also applies.

rules.label: 1.2.N - Double settings on Steam (1st offense)
rules.reason: Changing hz on Steam in game.
rules.notes: Example: switching from 90hz to 72hz mid game.

rules.label: 1.2.N - Double settings on Steam (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated use of double settings on Steam.

rules.label: 1.2.O - 3rd party software such as Walkin VR/OVR Dynamic Resolution (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using banned 3rd party software.
rules.notes: FPSvr is excluded.

rules.label: 1.2.O - 3rd party software such as Walkin VR/OVR Dynamic Resolution (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated use of banned 3rd party software.

rules.label: 1.3.A - Advertising personal Discord/server (1st offense)
rules.reason: Advertising a personal Discord/server without allowed affiliation.

rules.label: 1.3.A - Advertising personal Discord/server (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated advertising of a personal Discord/server.

rules.label: 1.3.A - Advertising personal Discord/server (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued advertising of a personal Discord/server.

rules.label: 1.3.A - Advertising personal Discord/server (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent advertising of a personal Discord/server.

rules.label: 1.3.A - Advertising personal Discord/server (5th offense)
rules.reason: Chronic advertising of a personal Discord/server.

rules.label: 1.3.B - Promotion in wrong channel (1st offense)
rules.reason: Promoting content in non-designated chat.

rules.label: 1.3.B - Promotion in wrong channel (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated promotion in non-designated chat.

rules.label: 1.3.B - Promotion in wrong channel (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued promotion in non-designated chat.

rules.label: 1.3.B - Promotion in wrong channel (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent promotion in non-designated chat.

rules.label: 1.3.B - Promotion in wrong channel (5th offense)
rules.reason: Chronic promotion in non-designated chat.

rules.label: 1.4.A - Spamming / copypasta / text walls (1st offense)
rules.reason: Spamming, copy-paste spam, or text walls.

rules.label: 1.4.A - Spamming / copypasta / text walls (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated spam or text walls.

rules.label: 1.4.A - Spamming / copypasta / text walls (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued spam or text walls.

rules.label: 1.4.A - Spamming / copypasta / text walls (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent spam or text walls.

rules.label: 1.4.A - Spamming / copypasta / text walls (5th offense)
rules.reason: Chronic spam or text walls.

rules.label: 1.4.B - Excessive swearing (1st offense)
rules.reason: Excessive swearing.

rules.label: 1.4.B - Excessive swearing (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated excessive swearing.

rules.label: 1.4.B - Excessive swearing (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued excessive swearing.

rules.label: 1.4.B - Excessive swearing (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent excessive swearing.

rules.label: 1.4.B - Excessive swearing (5th offense)
rules.reason: Chronic excessive swearing.

rules.label: 1.4.C - Misuse of scrim channels (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using the wrong channel for scrim/ref requests.

rules.label: 1.4.C - Misuse of scrim channels (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated misuse of scrim channels.

rules.label: 1.4.C - Misuse of scrim channels (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent misuse of scrim channels.

rules.label: 1.5.A - Hostility toward staff (1st offense)
rules.reason: Hostility directed toward staff members.

rules.label: 1.5.A - Hostility toward staff (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated hostility directed toward staff members.

rules.label: 1.5.A - Hostility toward staff (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Persistent hostility directed toward staff members.

rules.label: 1.6.A - Allowing banned players in official scrims
rules.reason: Willingly allowing banned players to partake in official scrims.
rules.notes: Banned player receives maximum punishment.

rules.label: 1.6.B - Helping banned members / ban evasion (1st offense)
rules.reason: Facilitating banned players in competitive scenes or failing to report evasion.

rules.label: 1.6.B - Helping banned members / ban evasion (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated facilitation of banned players or ban evasion.

rules.label: 1.7.A - Voice changer (1st offense)
rules.reason: Using a voice changer in VC.

rules.label: 1.7.A - Voice changer (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated voice changer usage.

rules.label: 1.7.A - Voice changer (3rd offense)
rules.reason: Continued voice changer usage.

rules.label: 1.7.A - Voice changer (4th offense)
rules.reason: Persistent voice changer usage.

rules.label: 1.7.B - VC disruption / soundboard / mic spam (1st offense)
rules.reason: Disrupting VC with loud soundboards, mic spam, or similar.

rules.label: 1.7.B - VC disruption / soundboard / mic spam (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeated VC disruption.

rules.label: 1.7.C - Minor VC argument
rules.reason: Engaging in a minor argument or conflict in VC.

rules.label: 1.7.C - Medium VC argument
rules.reason: Engaging in a medium-severity argument or conflict in VC.

rules.label: 1.7.C - Major VC argument
rules.reason: Engaging in a major argument or conflict in VC.

rules.label: 1.7.D - Encouraging an argument (1st offense)
rules.reason: Encouraging an argument in VC.

rules.label: 1.7.D - Encouraging an argument (2nd offense)
rules.reason: Repeatedly encouraging arguments in VC.

rules.label: 1.8.A - Swearing during official matches
rules.reason: Swearing, cussing, or slurs during official matches.
rules.notes: Use manual handling for warnings, sit-outs, point forfeits, or match forfeits.
